title: Plan: decompose an ambiguous initiative
task: Break an ambiguous quarterly initiative ('reduce checkout abandonment') into PR-sized leaf tasks with explicit critical path, owners, and out-of-scope items.
baseline_prompt: Decompose the initiative 'reduce checkout abandonment by 20% this quarter' into engineering work. Produce PR-sized leaf tasks tagged with t-shirt estimates (XS / S / M / L). Identify the critical path and the first blocker that has to land before anything else can. Name explicit out-of-scope items so scope creep is visible. Assign owners (TBD where unclear) and surface the assumptions or metrics that need clarifying before work starts.
polymath_prompt: Decompose the initiative 'reduce checkout abandonment by 20% this quarter' into engineering work. Produce PR-sized leaf tasks tagged with t-shirt estimates (XS / S / M / L). Identify the critical path and the first blocker that has to land before anything else can. Name explicit out-of-scope items so scope creep is visible. Assign owners (TBD where unclear) and surface the assumptions or metrics that need clarifying before work starts. Use Polymath's planning work-breakdown and decisions tradeoff-matrix skills.
